rules.description: Hold the invoice if the invoice quantity exceeds the PO quantity for any line item.
rules.raw_text: If Invoice Quantity exceeds PO Quantity for any line item the invoice must be held.

rules.description: Escalate the invoice to the Finance Controller if the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more.
rules.raw_text: If the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more the invoice must be escalated to the Finance Controller.

rules.description: Flag the invoice for review if the GRN date is after the invoice date.
rules.raw_text: If the GRN date is after the invoice date the invoice must be flagged for review.

rules.description: Auto-approve the invoice if the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount.
rules.raw_text: If the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount the invoice is auto-approved.

rules.description: Flag the invoice as under-invoiced if the invoice total is less than the PO amount by more than 5%.
rules.raw_text: If the invoice total is less than the PO amount by more than 5% the invoice must be flagged as under-invoiced.

suggested_fix.description: Auto-approve the invoice if the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount, otherwise flag as under-invoiced if less than the PO amount by more than 5%.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount, the invoice is auto-approved. Otherwise, if the invoice total is less than the PO amount by more than 5%, the invoice must be flagged as under-invoiced.

rules.description: Escalate the invoice to the Finance Controller with a mandatory justification note if the invoice total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more.
rules.raw_text: If the invoice total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more a mandatory justification note must be attached before escalation to the Finance Controller.

suggested_fix.description: Escalate the invoice to the Finance Controller with a mandatory justification note if the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more, a mandatory justification note must be attached before escalation to the Finance Controller.

rules.description: Request CFO approval with a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation if the invoice is above INR 50,00,000.
rules.raw_text: If the invoice is above INR 50,00,000 a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation must accompany the CFO approval request.

suggested_fix.description: Request CFO approval with a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation if the invoice is above INR 50,00,000.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice is above INR 50,00,000, a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation must accompany the CFO approval request.

conflicts.explanation: Both rules fire when the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more, but AP-APR-002 escalates to the Finance Controller without justification, while AP-APR-006 requires a mandatory justification note.

suggested_fix.description: Escalate the invoice to the Finance Controller with a mandatory justification note if the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice grand total exceeds the PO amount by 10% or more, a mandatory justification note must be attached before escalation to the Finance Controller.

conflicts.explanation: Both rules fire when the invoice total is close to the PO amount, but AP-APR-004 auto-approves if within 1%, while AP-APR-005 flags as under-invoiced if less than the PO amount by more than 5%.

suggested_fix.description: Auto-approve the invoice if the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount, otherwise flag as under-invoiced if less than the PO amount by more than 5%.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice total is within 1% of the PO amount, the invoice is auto-approved. Otherwise, if the invoice total is less than the PO amount by more than 5%, the invoice must be flagged as under-invoiced.

conflicts.explanation: Both rules fire when the invoice is above INR 50,00,000, but AP-APR-006 escalates to the Finance Controller, while AP-APR-007 requests CFO approval.

suggested_fix.description: Request CFO approval with a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation if the invoice is above INR 50,00,000.
suggested_fix.raw_text: If the invoice is above INR 50,00,000, a mandatory justification note and audit trail documentation must accompany the CFO approval request.
